evals.prompt: List all my AQA suites and tell me how many flows each one has
evals.expected_output: Should call GET /a11y/suites, display a table of suites with their IDs, names, flow counts, and crawler counts. Should validate env vars and connectivity first.

evals.prompt: Create a new flow called 'Contact Page' for suite TS612 with URL https://example.com/contact
evals.expected_output: Should call POST /a11y/suites/TS612/flows/url/create with the correct name and URL in the body. Should report back the new flow ID.

evals.prompt: I have run ID A3687-1747995246509. Get me all the accessibility issues from that run grouped by severity.
evals.expected_output: Should first GET the run details to check status, then GET /flows to list all flows in the run, then GET issues for each flow. Should aggregate and display issues sorted by impact: critical > serious > moderate > minor, grouped by ruleId.

evals.prompt: Fix the accessibility issues in my suite TS612. The site is a Next.js app in this repo.
evals.expected_output: Should follow the full remediation workflow: validate env vars, get suite details for TS612, collect flow/crawler IDs, create a test with rulesetPackId v2 and rulesetId wcag22, trigger a run, poll until ready, fetch issues for all flows/pages, sort by severity, map issues to source files using Next.js routing patterns (app/ or pages/), apply fixes for up to 20 issues in severity order using the remediation guidance, run build and tests, and create a PR with conventional commit format.
